title: EPROTO error when executing Google Sheets node
symptom: When executing a workflow with the Google Sheets node, an EPROTO error occurs, indicating a TLS/SSL protocol issue.
not_this_if: Different node or integration is used
root_cause: The EPROTO error is typically caused by network or certificate issues within the Docker environment, such as incorrect system time, outdated Docker images, or misconfigured DNS settings.
fix_steps: Update n8n to the latest version using 'docker pull n8nio/n8n:latest'.
Check and sync the system time on the Docker host.
Add Google's DNS to your docker-compose.yml.
Set Node.js TLS options cautiously if necessary.
Verify Google API access from within the container.
agent_instruction: Follow the steps to update n8n and check system time to resolve the EPROTO error.
safety_notes: Using NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 disables certificate validation; use only for testing.
